symbols.vision_description: A hand-drawn spiral with multiple concentric loops, resembling a coiled shape or fingerprint pattern, drawn with rough black lines on a light background.

Hand-drawn circular shape with two concentric circles, a diagonal oval/line element inside the inner circle, and small dash marks scattered around the outer perimeter, resembling a planet with rings or a stylized target.
Hand-drawn spiral with multiple concentric turns forming a coiled pattern, with dashed lines extending outward from the spiral
Hand-drawn sketch of a face with curly/wavy hair, closed or squinting eyes, and a small smile, rendered in simple line art.
Hand-drawn sketch of a round organic shape, possibly a fruit like a peach or avocado, with an irregular outline and internal curved lines suggesting a pit or texture.
Simple line drawing of a stylized figure with a teardrop/oval body and a small head protruding from the top, with three small dots inside the body.
A stylized Chinese character in seal script style with flowing curved strokes forming loops and curves, appearing to be a glyph from an ancient or decorative Chinese inscription.
A black-outlined circle containing three filled dots arranged in a triangular face pattern (two eyes on top, one mouth below), with a partial angular character/symbol visible to the right.
A circle containing three dots arranged like a simple face: two dots side by side on top (eyes) and one dot centered below (mouth).
A circular face with two dark dots as eyes and a small mark below as a mouth, flanked by two angular bracket-like shapes on the left and right sides that resemble stylized arms or hands.
A circle containing three small filled dots arranged in a triangular face pattern (two dots on top like eyes, one below like a mouth)
A circular outline containing three small filled dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two dots on top, one on bottom), resembling a simple face or emoticon.
A circular ring outline containing three filled black dots arranged in a triangular pattern: two dots on top (like eyes) and one dot below (like a mouth), resembling a simple face.

A circle containing three dots arranged like a simple face: two dots on top and one centered below, resembling eyes and a mouth. A partial character (looks like a lowercase 'j') is visible to the right.

A circle containing three dots arranged in a triangular pattern (two upper dots like eyes, one lower dot like a mouth), with a short vertical line extending downward from the bottom of the circle, resembling a simple face or character.

A central circle with three dots arranged in a triangular face pattern (two upper dots like eyes, one lower dot like a mouth), flanked by a gamma-like shape on the left and an X-like shape on the right.

A circular outline containing four small filled dots arranged in a 2x2 square pattern, resembling a stylized face or abstract dot-in-circle symbol. A partial hook-like or 'J'-shaped stroke is visible at the right edge of the crop.
A black-outlined circle containing two dots (resembling eyes), followed by the numeral '2' to the right, resembling a page-number or list-item marker.
A circle containing three dots inside, resembling a simple face icon
A round circle with two upper dots (eyes) and one lower dot (mouth), flanked by angular bracket-like characters resembling 'r' on the left and 'Y' on the right, forming a stylized 'TOY' wordmark.
